changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE system_geo_parameters ( id serial, system_id integer DEFAULT NULL, country_id integer DEFAULT NULL, state_id integer DEFAULT NULL, number_of_rec_processed double precision DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_system_geo_parameters PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_system_geo_parameters_to_system FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES systems (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_system_geo_parameters_to_country FOREIGN KEY (country_id) REFERENCES countries (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE , CONSTRAINT fk_system_geo_parameters_to_state FOREIGN KEY (state_id) REFERENCES states (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE ); CREATE INDEX i_system_geo_parameters_system ON system_geo_parameters (system_id); CREATE INDEX i_system_geo_parameters_country ON system_geo_parameters (country_id);
